jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly declare the maven-war-plugin to ensure WAR packaging works correctly with newer Maven versions.
Integrate JaCoCo for code coverage measurement and reporting.
Integrate Coveralls plugin to upload coverage reports to the Coveralls service.
Add JAXB API dependency required by the Coveralls plugin, which is no longer included in the JDK runtime starting from Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Apache Camel core version to 2.24.0 to support newer features and fixes.
Upgrade Lombok version to 1.18.22 for compatibility and new features.
Add UTF-8 encoding properties for source and reporting to ensure consistent character handling.
Add JaCoCo plugin to enable code coverage analysis during the build process.
Add Coveralls plugin to integrate code coverage reporting with external services.
Add JAXB API dependency to resolve missing module issues in Java 17 for the Coveralls plugin.
